metadata.title: Build an SR8-compilable srx_ace_audit_agent for a local business site in South Asia, using the failure_lens to detect and audit fake_test_risk inputs, with explicit validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SR8-compilable srx_ace_audit_agent for a local business site in South Asia, using the failure_lens to detect and audit fake_test_risk inputs, with explicit validation gates.
mission.success_definition: 1. The agent compiles without errors in SR8. 2. Validation gates reject any input missing required fields. 3. Failure_lens correctly identifies fake_test_risk patterns with >95% accuracy. 4. Output contract includes objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections. 5. All constraints are satisfied and documented.

in_scope.item: The agent must audit local business site operations for fake_test_risk patterns, applying failure_lens analysis to identify compliance gaps. Scope includes South Asia healthcare_admin context but excludes global or non-healthcare domains.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: 1. The agent compiles without errors in SR8. 2. Validation gates reject any input missing required fields. 3. Failure_lens correctly identifies fake_test_risk patterns with >95% accuracy. 4. Output contract includes objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections. 5. All constraints are satisfied and documented.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.audit_scope: Build an SR8-compilable srx_ace_audit_agent for a local business site in South Asia, using the failure_lens to detect and audit fake_test_risk inputs, with explicit validation gates.
SRXML_Artifact.evidence_policy: Use source evidence and mark unsupported claims.

inspection_steps.item: The agent must audit local business site operations for fake_test_risk patterns, applying failure_lens analysis to identify compliance gaps. Scope includes South Asia healthcare_admin context but excludes global or non-healthcare domains.

findings_contract.item: 1. The agent compiles without errors in SR8. 2. Validation gates reject any input missing required fields. 3. Failure_lens correctly identifies fake_test_risk patterns with >95% accuracy. 4. Output contract includes objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections. 5. All constraints are satisfied and documented.

receipt_contract.item: The output must be a JSON object with fields: artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, compiled_intent. compiled_intent must contain Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract. All fields must be non-null and conform to SR8 schema.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: The raw intent contains ambiguous and incomplete constraints (e.g., 'failure_lens' undefined, 'fake_test_risk' as chaos input lacks specification, missing context for local_business_site and healthcare_admin role). Without clear definitions for failure_lens, fake_test_risk, and the exact validation gates, the SR8 compiler cannot produce a deterministic objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, or output contract. The request also mixes urgent language with partial constraints, making it impossible to guarantee a governed artifact that meets D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE compliance and audit requirements.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
